Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of verifier returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being verified
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleComparableVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T>, ExtensibleObjectVerifier<S,​T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
FloatingPointVerifier<T>, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractFloatingPointVerifier, AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, DoubleVerifierImpl, FloatingPointVerifierNoOp, FloatVerifierImpl, PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp, PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
public interface ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
extends ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T>
Verifies the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointVerifier.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type Method Description
    S isFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is finite.
    S isNotFinite()
    Ensures that the actual value is not finite.
    S isNotNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is not a number.
    S isNumber()
    Ensures that the actual value is a number.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

    isBetween, isBetweenClosed, isComparableTo, isComparableTo, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThan, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isGreaterThanOrEqualTo, isLessThan, isLessThan, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isLessThanOrEqualTo, isNotComparableTo, isNotComparableTo

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleNumberVerifier

    isMultipleOf, isMultipleOf, isNegative, isNotMultipleOf, isNotMultipleOf, isNotNegative, isNotPositive, isNotWholeNumber, isNotZero, isPositive, isWholeNumber, isZero

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isActualAvailable, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isNumber

      S isNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is a number.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not a number
      See Also:
      Double.isNaN()

    • isNotNumber

      S isNotNumber()
      Ensures that the actual value is not a number.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is a number
      See Also:
      Double.isNaN()

    • isFinite

      S isFinite()
      Ensures that the actual value is finite.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not finite
      See Also:
      Double.isInfinite()

    • isNotFinite

      S isNotFinite()
      Ensures that the actual value is not finite.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is finite
      See Also:
      Double.isInfinite()
